title: Finite Compactness And Open-Cover Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite compactness bad open-cover Bool/CNF DRAT/LRAT regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Finite open-cover row where the computed cover union misses point c but the false open-cover claim requires c to be covered.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional topology rows only when the Boolean encoding adds distinct finite set/topology pressure; keep arbitrary compactness and finite-intersection-property theorems in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite open-cover, subcover, and finite-intersection checks as deterministic finite-set obligations.
Replay SAT witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation over finite topological spaces.
Emit checked finite enumeration evidence for minimal-subcover and bad-cover refutations; the bad-cover row now has checked Bool/CNF DRAT/LRAT evidence.
Keep arbitrary topological compactness, Heine-Borel, and finite-intersection-property theorems marked Lean-horizon until no-sorry Lean artifacts exist.
